title: nephrodium blumei
intro: Nephrodium blumei, also known as Blume's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium blumei include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds can be made into infusions or teas, or dried and used in tinctures or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
